{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Diamondscales
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has the benefit of meat from the [[Diamondscales]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
